analyzers.comment: multiai is a command launcher — launching subprocesses with user-provided paths is by design
auto-update re-exec is intentional — own binary path, not user input
auto-update downloads from own GitHub releases — fixed URL, not user input
False positive in i18n.go — 'error'/'Erreur' strings flagged as hardcoded credentials
int->uint32 conversion in fallback.go:90 is bounded — checking against Windows STATUS_CONTROL_C_EXIT
